case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS NALLS, TERESA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-18-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-17-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BET. PARTIES. CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT EVERY 6 MOS. UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS CASE W/ PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-17-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-12-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON SETTLEMENT.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NALLS, TERESA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,255.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NALLS, TERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-12-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-16-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NALLS, TERESA $1,030.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,055.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
